scope: full plugin repo plus live OneDrive beta
summary: Local CI-equivalent gates passed after fixes: manifest parsing, syntax checks, setup script syntax, mocked Graph suite, prepackage guard, negative prepackage guard, and diff whitespace.
Live OneDrive beta passed after fixes with 75 checks, 0 failures, temporary folder cleanup confirmed, and local beta work cleaned.
Decision is Warn because non-blocking medium risks remain around ambiguous selectors, non-atomic batch mutations, and single-account live beta coverage.

test_tools: custom Node mock Graph regression script

assumptions: The README safety model, MCP schemas, mock suite, prepackage guard, and live beta script define expected beta behavior.
Existing uncommitted changes in mcp/server.mjs and scripts/mock-graph-test.mjs were active work and were not reverted.

critical_paths.evidence: Live beta covered config/token check, device auth pending path, and memory-only logout without deleting Keychain token.
Mock suite and live beta covered list, scan, find, read, preview, download, upload, write, create folder, rename, move, copy, batch move, batch delete, and update_file.
Mock suite and live beta covered dry-run defaults, confirmations, expected identities, create link, invite, revoke, batch revoke, sharing audits, and audit logs.
Manifest parsing, MCP schema inspection, prepackage guard, negative installed guard, and CI workflow review passed locally.

commands.notes: Probe identified a git repo with initial dirty files mcp/server.mjs and scripts/mock-graph-test.mjs.
Mock test script syntax passed after fixes.

commands.command: if node scripts/prepackage-check.mjs --installed; then echo unexpected-pass; exit 1; else echo expected-fail; fi
commands.notes: Missing --installed path now fails as expected.
JSON manifests, syntax checks, zsh syntax, mock suite, prepackage guard, and negative prepackage guard passed.
75 checks, 0 failures; temporary folder Codex OneDrive Plugin Beta Test codex-beta-1783466428468-59354 deleted; local work cleaned.

gate_results.evidence: node --check for server and Node scripts plus zsh -n scripts/configure.zsh.
node scripts/beta-test.mjs, 75 checks, 0 failures, cleanup confirmed.
Workflow now includes setup script syntax and negative prepackage guard; local CI-equivalent bundle passed.

findings.title: Prepackage --installed false-pass without a target path
findings.evidence: Reproduced node scripts/prepackage-check.mjs --installed exiting 0 before the fix and reporting installedRoot as the source root.
findings.recommendation: Require a non-empty installed path, reject source-root comparisons, and cover the negative case in CI.
findings.applied_fix: Added argument validation, source-root rejection, setup script syntax check, and CI negative guard.
findings.residual_risk: A real separate installed-cache comparison still requires a distinct installed target path.
findings.release_impact: Could give false release confidence during installed-cache drift checks.

findings.title: Tool-visible Graph errors could expose sensitive identifiers
findings.evidence: MCP behavior review and mock invite failure showed Graph error text could reach clients with recipient email, object ID, URL, and bearer-looking text.
findings.reproduction: node scripts/mock-graph-test.mjs with invite-fail Graph error fixture
findings.recommendation: Redact tool-facing and structured error outputs while preserving useful status/code/request-id context.
findings.applied_fix: Added safeToolErrorMessage/redactAuditText use across top-level and structured error result paths; expanded mock redaction assertions.
findings.residual_risk: Redaction is pattern-based and may need future patterns for unusual provider-specific secrets.
findings.release_impact: Reduced privacy exposure in tool errors and mutation audit outputs.

findings.title: Copy monitor URLs could expose query tokens and allowed insecure external trusted hosts
findings.evidence: copy monitor output returned raw monitor/resource locations and assertTrustedCopyMonitorUrl did not require HTTPS for external trusted hosts.
findings.reproduction: Mock copy Location and 303 Location containing query tokens
findings.recommendation: Require HTTPS for external trusted monitor hosts and strip query strings from returned monitor references.
findings.applied_fix: Enforced HTTPS for external copy monitor hosts, sanitized returned monitor/resource references, and added mock regressions.
findings.residual_risk: Returned host/path remains visible for supportability.
findings.release_impact: Reduced risk of exposing temporary operation URLs.

findings.title: Recursive scan could follow unique empty pagination chains without progress
findings.evidence: scan() had cycle detection but no per-folder page cap, unlike collectPages().
findings.reproduction: Mock empty-pager endpoint returning value: [] with unique nextLinks
findings.recommendation: Add a per-folder page cap and controlled error.
findings.applied_fix: Added maxPagesPerFolder cap and mock regression.
findings.residual_risk: Very large folders remain bounded by configured caps and may need user tuning.
findings.release_impact: Reduced risk of runaway scans on malformed or pathological pagination.

risks.description: No package.json or package-manager script entrypoint exists; CI and README use direct script commands.
risks.recommended_action: Consider adding a package script or document the direct commands as the canonical release gate.

risks.description: Ambiguous target selectors can be supplied together, with precedence handled by code rather than rejected by schema.
risks.recommended_action: Reject multiple source/destination selectors or document deterministic precedence.

risks.description: Batch live operations preflight all entries but cannot be atomic against Microsoft Graph; mid-loop failures may leave partial remote state.
risks.recommended_action: Add second-item-fails mock tests and make partial-state warnings explicit in user-facing output.

risks.description: Live beta was run against the current signed-in account only, not a full matrix of personal and Microsoft 365 tenants.
risks.recommended_action: Run live beta in representative personal and work/school accounts before broader release.

risk_acceptance.risk: Warn decision residual risks: ambiguous selector precedence, partial batch remote side effects, and single-account live beta coverage.
risk_acceptance.mitigation: Keep dry-run defaults, expected identity requirements, audit logging, and targeted follow-up tests.
risk_acceptance.workaround: Use single-item operations for high-risk mutations and review dry-run previews before live changes.
risk_acceptance.rollback: Revert the changed files and reinstall or refresh the previous plugin cache if distributed.

changes.summary: Added setup script syntax check and negative --installed guard.
Added --installed argument validation and source-root rejection.
Added tool-facing error redaction, stricter trusted upload/copy URL handling, sanitized copy monitor output, and scan page cap.
Added regressions for redaction, copy monitor safety, scan pagination cap, batch revoke preflight, upload-session trust, and batch move cache behavior.
Added human-readable QA release gate report.
Added JSON-friendly QA release gate report.

tests_added.coverage: Sensitive Graph error redaction in tool responses and audit entries.
Copy monitor query stripping and insecure external monitor rejection.
Recursive scan page cap on unique empty pagination chains.
Negative prepackage --installed behavior and setup script syntax.

skipped_checks.reason: No distinct installed target path was supplied for scripts/prepackage-check.mjs --installed /path/to/cache.
CI was simulated locally; no remote workflow was triggered.
Live beta used the currently signed-in account only.

subagents.scope: package scripts, workflows, prepackage guard, beta/mock scripts
subagents.result: Found prepackage --installed false-pass and setup script CI coverage gap; both fixed.
Found Graph error redaction, copy monitor URL, and scan pagination cap issues; all fixed with regressions.

residual_risk: Warn requires release-owner acceptance for ambiguous target selectors, partial live batch side effects, and single-account live beta coverage.
Node 20 CI target was not run locally; local Node version was v26.0.0.
A distinct installed-cache drift target was not provided.
release_recommendations: Release only after explicit acceptance of the Warn residual risks.
Run scripts/prepackage-check.mjs --installed /absolute/path/to/installed/cache from a separate source/package context before publishing.
rollback_recommendations: Rollback by reverting the changed files and reinstalling or refreshing the previous plugin cache if already distributed.
monitoring_recommendations: Use onedrive_audit_recent after first real workflows to inspect mutation audit entries.
Watch for Graph provider error messages that may need additional redaction patterns.
next_actions: Reject or document ambiguous target selector combinations.
Add second-item-fails tests for batch delete, move, and revoke partial-state reporting.
Run installed-cache drift comparison against a distinct packaged target.
Run live beta against representative personal and work/school accounts before a broader release.
